text: Round 1 complete. Found **9 crates**. Now launching Round 2 - one agent per crate to find the 3 most complex functions in each.

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Complex functions in api crate", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "In the directory rust/crates/api/src/, find the 3 most complex functions by analyzing line count and cyclomatic complexity (number of branches: if/else, match arms, loops, ? operators, closures). For each function, report:
1. Function name and file path
2. Line count (start line - end line)
3. Estimated cyclomatic complexity (count branches)
4. Brief description of what it does

Be very thorough - read all .rs files in the crate. Rank by complexity (combination of line count and branch count)."}
